title: Add tests for category counts and admin UI
description: Ensure the bug fixes for category counts (backend) and the UI elements (frontend) are correctly tested. Add backend integration tests for the count logic and (if possible) E2E or snapshot tests for the UI changes.
acceptance_criteria: Backend test: assert count increases when adding product to category
Backend test: assert count decreases when removing product or deleting product
E2E (Playwright): verify category table columns include product counts
Verify no regressions in other category endpoints
